response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed 4 virtual characters (Hololive Gamers: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) performing a medley of songs. 2. Monitored on-screen graphic at the bottom of the video for song titles and original artists. 3. Identified songs: 'Kagerou Daze' by Jin, 'Kyu-kurarin' by Iyowa, 'Roki' by Mikito-P, and 'Kami no Manimani' by Rerulili. 4. Performed web searches for each song title + artist + 'Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Verified that lyrics for all four songs were found successfully.
response.global_summary: A 4-song medley performance by Hololive Gamers (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone) consisting of 'Kagerou Daze', 'Kyu-kurarin', 'Roki', and 'Kami no Manimani'.

scenes.description: The group performs 'Kagerou Daze'. Title and artist appear at the bottom of the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
8月15日の午後12時半くらいのこと
天気がいい
病気になりそうなほど眩しい日差しの中
することもないから君と駄弁っていた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It happened at around 12:30 pm on August 15
The weather was nice
In the dazzling sunlight that seemed to make you sick
Having nothing to do, I was chattering with you

scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
うるさく鳴いた文字盤を見てた
きっときっと鏡越し
8時過ぎのにおい
しらけた顔
変わってなくてよかった
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I looked at the noisy crying clock face
Surely, surely, the smell of past eight through the mirror
Your pale face hasn't changed, I'm glad

scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
さあ 眠眠打破 昼夜逆転 VOX AC30W
テレキャスター背負ったサブカルボーイがバンド仲間にやっほー
アルバイトはネクラモード 対バンにはATフィールド
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's break the sleep and reverse day and night with a VOX AC30W
A subculture boy with a Telecaster on his back greets his bandmates with a 'yahoo'
Working part-time in 'NEET mode', AT fields against rival bands

scenes.description: The group finishes with a segment of 'Kami no Manimani'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
思い通りにいかないことだらけ
どうしようもなく自己嫌悪
八百万の痛みや悲しみから
逃げ込める場所を探してる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Nothing ever goes the way I want it to
And I can't help but feel self-loathing
Searching for a place to escape
From the millions of pains and sorrows
